sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_string String, value Float64);
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id UInt32, num_value Float64);
SELECT id, -parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(date_string) AS negated_date FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, (value + -parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(date_string)) AS adjusted_value FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, sum(-num_value) OVER (PARTITION BY id) AS negated_sum FROM test_numbers;
SELECT a.id, -parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(a.date_string) AS negated_date, b.num_value FROM test_dates a JOIN test_numbers b ON a.id = b.id WHERE b.num_value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, value, Case WHEN date_string IS NULL THEN -parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero('01/01/2000') ELSE -parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(date_string) END AS result FROM test_dates HAVING result < 0;
WITH (SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_dates WHERE date_string IS NOT NULL) AS total_value SELECT id, -parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(date_string) AS negated_date, total_value FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero('02/30/2020') - -parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(date_string) AS difference FROM test_dates;
